statement.en: Decoding presenilin 1 mutations in Alzheimer’s disease : molecular, cellular, and behavioural signatures
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a thesis under embargo (abstract not yet publicly available) with a future date (2026-04-25), making validation impossible at evaluation time. The work addresses presenilin 1 mutations in Alzheimer's disease—a domain with established biological fact (PSEN1 mutations are proven causal factors) but specific molecular mechanisms, cellular signatures, and behavioral findings remain subject to ongoing research validation. Classification as FLOWING reflects provisional status pending publication and peer review.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 変異が時間とともに記憶を振動させ、減衰する様子を見た。
